message:
Command `sleep 20
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v3.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended"
tail -12 /tmp/pnr_v3.log` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
sleep 20
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v3.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended"
tail -12 /tmp/pnr_v3.log
